passiveAbilities.name: Sage Advice
passiveAbilities.description: Friendly models within 4” may ignore Catastrophe effects.

passiveAbilities.name: Tough as Old Boots
passiveAbilities.description: At the start of the Replenish Step this model recovers 2 Wds.

passiveAbilities.name: Smell a Lie
passiveAbilities.description: Enemy models targeting this model, or a model within 2”, must reveal the arcane card as it is played.

activeAbilities.name: Forgetfulness
activeAbilities.description: Remove one Arcane or Active Ability from target character until the end of the turn.

arcaneAbilities.name: Snare Traps
arcaneAbilities.description:
This attack is not modified by Evade Stat or Cover.
[G]X: Targets suffers X Piercing Dmg
Catastrophe: This character suffers 2 Wds.
